A.text: Both the North and South Pacific are mostly unchanged.

B.text: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.

C.text: The North Pacific is mostly warming, while the South Pacific is mostly cooling.

parsed.answer_value: The North Pacific is mostly unchanged or cooling, while the South Pacific is mostly warming.
parsed.rationale: The map shows the North Pacific with colors indicating little to no change or cooling, while the South Pacific displays warmer colors, indicating warming trends.
